[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up cartoon-style yellow face with a frustrated grin appears above large, blocky text reading “PANTTEK”.

Setting:
The background is plain and light-colored, with no clear outdoor or indoor setting visible.

Visual Details:
The character’s head fills most of the upper area of the image, with a thick dark outline around the face features and eyebrows. The lighting is flat and even, and the composition centers the face above the text. The large lettering at the bottom is black with a white interior and has a bold, stencil-like block design.

Visible Text:
PANTTEK

Practical Summary:
The image shows a cartoon character with an angry, smug expression. Below it, the bold text “PANTTEK” is prominently displayed.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
